featured.title: New Season Kicks Off
featured.excerpt: The national premier league is back with eight teams competing for the championship.

about.label: About Us
about.title:
Building Football
Across Our Nation
paragraphs: The Example Football Association is the governing body for football in our nation, affiliated with FIFA and our continental confederation.
We are committed to developing football at all levels, from grassroots youth programs to the national team.
Our mission is to unite communities through the beautiful game.
